text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to have some tea with me,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
When I went back to my parents' house over
break, we drank this tea with a positively
wonderful aroma. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's very relaxing and helps you sleep at night. I
highly recommend it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Then, let's have a delightful teatime! I'll go boil
some water.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like Satono Diamond had a great time
on her day off!
